revision.comment: Imported page from https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/Module:TemplateStyles [[[w:en:User:Alexis Jazz/AJsImportTool.js|AJsImportTool]]]

Protected "[[Module:TemplateStyles]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 3340 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require extended confirmed access] (indefinite))

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 2 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:TemplateStyles]]
